service.name: Real-Time Price Feed
service.description: Returns current market price for any supported trading pair. Aggregates from multiple DEX and CEX sources for accuracy.

price.description: Price in quote currency as a decimal string.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the price observation.

confidence.description: Confidence score 0-1 based on source agreement.

auth.details: Sign the JSON request body with your registered agent private key. Include X-Agent-Address and X-Signature headers.
